scenarios.description: Setter returns this and allows fluent chaining when called consecutively
scenarios.precondition: Document doc = new Document("http://chain"); Document.OutputSettings s1 = new Document.OutputSettings(); Document.OutputSettings s2 = new Document.OutputSettings().prettyPrint(false);
scenarios.expectedResult: doc.outputSettings(s1).outputSettings(s2) returns same Document instance, and doc.outputSettings() is s2

scenarios.description: Getter returns internal reference even after setter mutation
scenarios.precondition: Document doc = new Document("http://example"); Document.OutputSettings newOs = new Document.OutputSettings().indentAmount(5); doc.outputSettings(newOs);
